title: Dragos publishes the first AI-assisted attack postmortem - TCR 05/13/26
description:
Dragos published 350 artifacts from the first LLM-assisted attack on a municipal water utility in Monterrey, Mexico, Microsoft revoked Azure access for Israel's Unit 8200 after confirming mass-surveillance terms-of-service violations, and Medicare's Innovation Center accepted 150 organizations into ACCESS, a 10-year payment model built to reimburse AI care agents monitoring chronic-care patients between visits.

https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-may-13-2026/

This episode covers the Dragos postmortem and the defensive substrate it creates for OT defenders across the hemisphere, Microsoft Israel general manager Alon Haimovich stepping down after the Covington & Burling inquiry into Unit 8200's Azure surveillance archive, Medicare ACCESS and Pair Team's Flora voice agent, Varda Space Industries and United Therapeutics manufacturing pharmaceuticals in low-Earth orbit, the Beyond EPICA 2.8-kilometer Antarctic ice core reaching 1.2 million years, the Clooney-Hanks-Streep Human Consent Standard for AI licensing, and Amazon's multiyear Transaera heat-pump contract using metal-organic frameworks for 40% energy savings.

The Dragos report reconstructs an attack run against the Monterrey metropolitan area water and drainage utility between December 2025 and February 2026, with Claude as the primary technical executor and GPT models handling analysis. Attackers without OT background refined technique in real environment as the campaign progressed, but failed to breach the control systems. The 350-artifact catalogue is now public training material for defenders. Microsoft's inquiry, conducted by Covington & Burling, concluded Unit 8200 had used Azure to store intercepted Palestinian cellular calls at near-limitless scale, violating company terms - the second contract-layer activation against state-scale surveillance this quarter, after Anthropic's Pentagon refusal. Medicare ACCESS goes live July 5 with participants including Pair Team and Whoop, reimbursing measurable health outcomes rather than clinician time across diabetes, hypertension, chronic kidney disease, obesity, depression, and anxiety. Varda's returned capsule carries a United Therapeutics compound grown in microgravity, where the absence of sedimentation and convection lets molecules settle into geometries inaccessible to ground-based reactors. Beyond EPICA's ice core opens the Mid-Pleistocene transition to direct observation across the full glacial-cycle regime change. The Human Consent Standard extends Really Simple Licensing to performers, publishing signed declarations that AI training pipelines can parse. Transaera's metal-organic framework heat pump dehumidifies before cooling, with payback in two to three years.
